creator: ejk@iki.fi
text:
I get the following error when compiling xlockmore in above
mentioned enviroment.

c++ -O -pipe -o ../xlock/xlock ../xlock/xlock.o ../xlock/passwd.o

Fix: 

Not known
How-To-Repeat: 
	Install XFree 4.0.2 from ports and try to install xlockmore
